notes: JASTER (jaster) 0-shot average, Table 2 of Preferred Networks' 'PLaMo-100B: A Ground-Up Language Model Designed for Japanese Proficiency' (arXiv:2410.07563). GPT-3.5 Turbo scored 0.567 as a comparison baseline in the paper's jaster results table (alongside GPT-4-0125-Preview 0.722, PLaMo-100B-Instruct 0.738); evaluation run via the same jaster/llm-jp-eval harness used for PLaMo-100B's own already-tracked jaster rows in this catalog. Not self-reported by OpenAI, hence classified independent.
